title: Epigram By Mr. Bowyer Intended To Be Placed Under The Head Of Gulliver. 1733
meaning:
"Epigram By Mr. Bowyer Intended To Be Placed Under The Head Of Gulliver. 1733" is a quintessential example of Jonathan Swift's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
